package kyo.example

import scala.scalanative.unsafe.*
import scala.scalanative.libc.errno.errno
import scala.scalanative.reflect.annotation.EnableReflectiveInstantiation
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativePtr, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class VoidBindingsImpl extends VoidBindings:
    import `VoidBindings$externs` as ext

    def noop()(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Unit =
        ext.noop()
        ()
end VoidBindingsImpl

object VoidBindingsImpl:
    import scala.scalanative.unsafe.*
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.VoidBindings")
end VoidBindingsImpl

@extern
@link("kyo_void")
private[example] object `VoidBindings$externs`:
    def noop(): Unit = extern
end `VoidBindings$externs`
